mapper.insert: insert into biz_test_task (device_id, operator_id, meter_point_id, deliver_date, test_date, temperature, humidity, tan_phi, r_percent) values (#{deviceId}, #{operatorId}, #{meterPointId}, #{deliverDate}, #{testDate}, #{temperature}, #{humidity}, #{tanPhi}, #{rPercent})
mapper.update: update biz_test_task set device_id = #{deviceId}, meter_point_id = #{meterPointId}, deliver_date = #{deliverDate}, test_date = #{testDate}, temperature = #{temperature}, humidity = #{humidity}, tan_phi = #{tanPhi}, r_percent = #{rPercent} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, device_id, operator_id, meter_point_id, deliver_date, test_date, temperature, humidity, tan_phi, r_percent from biz_test_task where id = #{id}
